-- Elgar Obfucator v1
return(function(...)local z,q do local r=math.floor local Q=math.random local R=table.remove local D=``local d=D.char local J=0 local v=2 local Y={}local a={}local M=0 local j={}for r=1,256,1 do(j)[r]=r end repeat local r=Q(1,#j)local z=R(j,r);(a)[z]=d(z-1)until#j==0 local Z={}local function T()if#Z==0 then J=(J*1+17765963196233)%35184372088832 repeat v=(v*142)%257 until v~=1 local Q=v%32 local R=(r(J/2^(13-(v-Q)/32))%4294967296.0)/2^Q local z=r((R%1)*4294967296.0)+r(R)local q=z%65536 local D=(z-q)/65536 local d=q%256 local Y=(q-d)/256 local a=D%256 local M=(D-a)/256 Z={d,Y;a,M}end return table.remove(Z)end local F={}q=setmetatable({},{__index=F,__metatable={}})local function g(r)local Q=``for R=#r,1,-1 do Q=Q..r:sub(R,R)end return Q end function z(r,Q)local R=F if(R)[Q]then else r=g(r)local z=`35184372088832`do Q=Q-2319523 end if 284887 then do Q=Q-481104 end end for r=1,1,1 do do Q=Q-274337 end end if tostring(Q)then do Q=Q-548806 end end if true then do Q=Q-1015276 end end Z={}local q=a J=Q%z if z then v=Q%`255`+2 end local d=D.len(r)local Y=buffer local M=Y and(Y.create and Y.create(d));(R)[Q]=D local j=235 for z=`1`,d,1 do if true then j=(((D)[(`etyb`):reverse()](r,z)+T())+j)%`256`end if M then Y.writeu8(M,z-1,string.byte((q)[j+1]))else(R)[Q]=(R)[Q]..(q)[j+`1`]end end if M then(R)[Q]=Y.tostring(M)end end return Q end end local
